reasoning:
To resolve 'YES', Leya Garifullina's FIDE rating must be at least 2478 (a 1% increase from her baseline of 2453 on 2025-10-26). Her rating on Wikipedia on October 26 is the October 1st list rating. 
For the November resolution dates, she must have gained 25 points in October 2025. During October, she competed in the Russian Women's Superfinal and the European Club Cup. Evidence indicates she was not leading the Superfinal midway through (Anna Shukhman was leading) and she suffered a loss to Divya Deshmukh in the European Club Cup on October 23. Gaining 25 points in a single month at the 2450 level requires a near-perfect performance in elite fields, which her recorded loss and the presence of other leaders (Shukhman) make unlikely. 
For the January resolution date, she has an additional two months (November and December) to achieve the gain. While she is a rising star who gained 27 points in August 2025, consistently performing at the level required to sustain 2478+ is difficult. Thus, the probability increases slightly due to more time but remains low.
